---
title: "Historical memorials of Canterbury : The landing of Augustine. The murder of Becket. Edward the Black Prince. Becket’s shrine"
---

## Historical memorials of Canterbury : The landing of Augustine. The murder of Becket. Edward the Black Prince. Becket’s shrine

**Author:** The Rev. Arthur Penrhyn Stanley
**Date:** 1855
**Imprint:** London: Murray

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
